title: Is the Options Market Predicting a Spike in International Paper (IP) Stock?
text: Investors need to pay close attention to International Paper (IP) stock based on the movements in the options market lately.

title: International Paper Company (IP) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: International Paper Company (NYSE:IP ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call October 27, 2022 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Mark Nelson - Vice President Investor Relations Mark Sutton - Chairman & Chief Executive Officer Tim Nicholls - Senior Vice President & Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants George Staphos - Bank of America Anthony Pettinari - Citi Mark Wilde - Bank of Montreal Mark Weintraub - Seaport Research Partners Mike Roxland - Truist Securities Adam Josephson - KeyBanc Kyle White - Deutsche Bank Operator Ladies and gentlemen, good morning and thank you for standing by. Welcome to today's International Paper Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Call.

title: International Paper (IP) Q3 Earnings Miss Estimates on Weak Demand
text: International Paper's (IP) third-quarter 2022 results reflect the impact of lower packaging demand as well as elevated energy and distribution costs.

title: What's in Store for International Paper (IP) in Q3 Earnings?
text: International Paper's (IP) Q3 performance will likely reflect solid demand for packaging and pulp products. Higher costs might have dented some of these gains.

title: International Paper stock a rare S&P 500 decliner after Deutsche Bank downgrades to sell
text: Shares of International Paper Co. IP, +1.87% fell 0.6% in premarket trading Tuesday, to buck the big rally in the broader stock market, after Deutsche Bank analyst Kyle White turned bearish on the paper and packaging products company, citing concerns over falling containerboard prices. "Given weakening demand and upcoming capacity additions, we anticipate containerboard prices will fall by $100 per ton in total over the next year," White wrote in a note to clients.

title: Building A Better International Paper: Attractive At 5.87% Dividend Yield
text: International Paper Company unlocks double-digit topline growth YoY, despite declining sales volume on both of its operating segments. It improves its operating margin, despite today's tough operating environment, snowballing its growing EPS.

title: 5 Stocks to Watch in a Promising Paper and Related Products Industry
text: The Zacks Paper and Related Products industry continues to gain from its rising e-commerce sales and strong demand for critical and consumer-oriented products. Players like IP, SUZ, SMFKY, VRTV and MERC are well-positioned to capitalize on this trend.
